title: vcenter/clone input
description: Clone an existing VM (source by vcenter.uuid) into a new VM named `name` (ADR-0114 — the D3 create-exception: the new VM projects identity-only).

projectKind.description: estate overlay for the new VM (ADR-0058 §6)

projectLabels.description: estate overlay labels carried on the new VM's Run-provenance projection
